security_gate.reason: Security gate failed because Critical vulnerabilities were detected.
security_gate.policy: FAIL if one or more Critical findings exist.

fix_suggestions.recommended_fix: Upgrade the vulnerable dependency to a patched and currently supported version.
fix_suggestions.example_fix: Update requirements.txt or package.json, then rerun dependency scanning.

fix_suggestions.recommended_fix: Avoid rendering unsanitized user input as HTML. Use safe text rendering or sanitize HTML.
Remove eval/exec usage and replace it with safe parsing or explicit controlled logic.
fix_suggestions.example_fix: Use json.loads(user_input) for JSON data instead of eval(user_input).

fix_suggestions.recommended_fix: Replace SQL string concatenation with parameterized queries or ORM-safe query methods.
Replace SQL string concatenation with parameterized queries or ORM-safe query methods.

Upgrade the vulnerable dependency to a patched and currently supported version.
